title: Were younger workers right all along? New study claims Gen Z workers say they are far more productive at home
summary: As Waller says “It is not necessarily because employees prefer being at home, but because home environments often offer greater control over noise, interruptions, and comfort." She highlights that workspaces need to support methods of working that suit everyone, with open-plan layouts…
